Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
19.10.27 Delos Bank Vault
The Delosian
bank
has a number of derelict vaults and these can only be opened with
keys
.
Keys can be purchased from the
website
!
When you have a complete
key
you can visit the bank in
Delos
, where they will have a set of 64
vault
doors
waiting to be unlocked (in an 8x8 grid).
The prize list that is hidden behind the locked doors is unchanging and listed below, but which door they are behind will be subject to change.
Before you choose which door to open you can even see what has been won from already opened doors!
When there are no prizes left on the
board
the bank will reset the contents to full once more!
The board will also reset when the special prize is claimed, as well as every in game
month
on the 1st.
DELOSBANK                    - view the board
DELOSBANK PRIZES             - view remaining prizes
DELOSBANK OPEN NUMBER <#>    - open a specific unopened vault
DELOSBANK OPEN <x> <y>       - open an unopened vault by coordinates
DELOSBANK OPENED             - list all opened vaults
DELOSBANK CLOSED             - list vaults still to be opened
DELOSBANK <number> / <x> <y> - view a specific vault
5
doors will each conceal 25 scintillating gems,
3
doors will each conceal a silver giftbox,
5 doors will each conceal 75
customisation
credits
,
10 doors will each conceal 65 credits (
bound
),
5 doors will each conceal 3
artefact
discount vouchers,
10 doors will each conceal a decorated sleeve,
5 doors will each conceal a page from the Tome of
Muses
,
1 door will conceal 150 credits (unbound),
1 doors will conceal 3 Mayan
crowns
,
1 door will conceal a dagger of
reincarnation
,
5 doors will each conceal a supreme scrapper trainer's token,
1 door will conceal
2
decorated sleeves,
5 doors will each conceal a bronze giftbox,
5 doors will each conceal a pair of artefact
vials
,
1 door will conceal a
phial
of shimmering
ink
,
and,
1 door will conceal the special prize*
* The special prize varies and changes when the board resets, it will always be one of the
following
:
- 800 credits
- A golden giftbox
- A platinum giftbox
- A token that can be exchanged for any
talisman
piece
(please
message
Makarios if you
win
this).
